data.title: Job Corps successfully rebounds, saving 48,000 jobs.
data.description: In recent data, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase of 15% in the unemployment rate, reaching a total of 7.5% in the last quarter. Furthermore, the country's gross domestic product (GDP) saw a decline of 3.2% compared to the previous year. The government has announced various stimulus packages totaling $50 billion to help alleviate the economic impact of these figures. Additionally, there has been a rise in inflation, with consumer prices increasing by 2.5% in the same period. This economic downturn has led to challenges for many families and businesses nationwide.
Chavez-DeRemer tested positive for banned substances.

data.title: Tianrong Internet Products launches $DEPIN Token on Solana for decentralized GPU Compute Sharing and AI Inference Market.
data.description: Tianrong Internet Products and Services Inc. has introduced the DEPIN Token on the Solana blockchain. This token aims to support the decentralized GPU compute sharing and AI inference market. This move is expected to revolutionize the industry by providing increased efficiency and accessibility. The introduction of the DEPIN Token signifies a significant development in the market, attracting attention for its innovative approach. Using Solana's platform, Tianrong Internet Products and Services Inc. is poised to make an impact in the world of decentralized computing and artificial intelligence.

data.title: California district court blocked state agency from adjudicating labor disputes while NLRB is unavailable.
data.description: During the holidays, a district court judge in California approved the National Labor Relations Board's request to halt enforcement of a law that allowed a state agency to handle labor disputes in cases where the federal agency was unable to intervene.

data.title: Trump's AI executive order complicates AI regulations, leaving employers in limbo amidst dispute with states.
data.description: The conflict between the Trump administration and states regarding artificial intelligence might impact employers, with potential repercussions for businesses nationwide.

data.title: Roofing expert Mike Hicks from New Philadelphia, Ohio shares tips on hiring a commercial roofing contractor in a HelloNation article.
data.description: In New Philadelphia, Ohio on February 17, 2026, a recent HelloNation article offers crucial advice for business owners seeking the right roofing contractor. The article emphasizes the significance of proper vetting procedures before commencing any roofing work. It outlines key indicators to consider and red flags to watch out for when choosing a roofer. This information is crucial for ensuring that business owners select a reliable contractor for their roofing needs.

data.title: Inflation dropped to 2.4%, lowest in 8 months; consumer-price inflation slowed from 2.7% to 2.4%. Core inflation at 2.5%.
data.description: Price pressures in the U.S. began to ease in early 2026, with the annual consumer-price inflation rate dropping from 2.7% in December to 2.4% in January. This figure was below economist predictions of 2.5% and represented the lowest level of inflation recorded since May 2025. The headline Consumer Price Index (CPI) saw a 0.2% increase on a monthly basis, slightly lower than both the previous month and the anticipated 0.3%. Core inflation, which excludes food and energy prices, also decreased from 2.6% in December to 2.5% in January, aligning with expectations. This marked the lowest core inflation rate since March 2021. Month over month, core CPI rose by 0.3%, meeting projections and showing a slight uptick from December's 0.2% increase.

data.title: Inventor from Florida creates Conditioning Comb (HAD-639) to apply conditioner easily and mess-free.
data.description: An inventor from Lox, Florida, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the CONDITIONING COMB, aiming to streamline the process of applying conditioner to hair. The innovative tool allows for even distribution of conditioner for effortless detangling. Introduced on February 17, 2026, this new approach to hair care could revolutionize routines. Designed to reduce mess and simplify the process, the inventor's idea could potentially aid in making hair care more efficient.

data.title: Despite investments, lack of data governance in hospitality industry slowing modernization efforts, per Info-Tech Research Group.
data.description: Ongoing investments in new digital platforms are being hindered in the hospitality industry due to unclear data standards and fragmented ownership, according to recent findings from Info-Tech Research Group. The study highlights that establishing precise data requirements and implementing structured discovery processes are crucial for advancing modernization efforts. This challenge is impacting businesses across the industry, where a significant percentage are struggling to adapt to the evolving digital landscape. The research underscores the importance of addressing these obstacles to drive innovation and improve operational efficiency.

ACCORDING TO BARR, THE JOB MARKET APPEARS BROADLY BALANCED RIGHT NOW, THOUGH IT REMAINS SENSITIVE TO ECONOMIC SHOCKS OR POLICY MISSTEPS. RECENT ECONOMIC REPORTS SUGGEST EMPLOYMENT CONDITIONS ARE STABILIZING, REDUCING FEARS OF OVERHEATING BUT NOT ELIMINATING LABOR RISKS.

data.title: Crypto treasuries of Strategy and Bitmine increase with BTC now at 717,131 and ETH at 4.37 million, amid market challenges.
data.description: Recent purchases have increased Strategy's Bitcoin holdings to 717,131 BTC and Bitmine's Ethereum holdings to 4.37 million ETH. These acquisitions have bolstered corporate crypto treasuries, demonstrating confidence in the market despite its ongoing weakness.

FED'S BARR SAID ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE SHOULD BOOST PRODUCTIVITY AND LIVING STANDARDS IN THE LONG RUN, EVEN IF IT DISRUPTS CERTAIN JOB SECTORS. BARR NOTED THERE IS LITTLE EVIDENCE SO FAR THAT AI IS DRIVING UP UNEMPLOYMENT OR CAUSING WIDESPREAD JOB LOSSES.

data.title: Volatus Aerospace Inc. demonstrates strong infrastructure, financial readiness, and operational execution post-Canada's Defence Industrial Strategy.
data.description: Volatus Aerospace Inc. emphasizes its strong infrastructure, financial preparedness, and operational efficiency post Canada’s Defence Industrial Strategy. The company is well-positioned with established facilities and resources, along with financial stability to support its operations. This strategic advantage enables Volatus Aerospace Inc. to effectively execute its plans in the defense sector, showcasing its readiness for future endeavors.

data.title: Merus is investing approximately $450 million to redevelop RiverGate Mall, a retail landmark in North Nashville, Madison, and Goodlettsville since 1971.
data.description: Today in Nashville, Tennessee, Merus, a top design-build real estate development company, revealed their acquisition and upcoming renovation of RiverGate Mall. The mall, a significant retail hub in North Nashville, Madison, and Goodlettsville since 1971, will undergo major transformations under the new ownership.
